{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603201148535B1F33E1C58D31A89B12\"}"},"total":2039},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7362089583672460094","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者写的不错，主角的身世和他的心性成正比，不像其他小说，主角多么深沉，多么有心机，都是凭空写出来的，只是架子，还有基点。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714189042,"group_id":"7339051860776455193","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwoUcEt8IRhRH84m81S/6qs=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"901220655170247","user_name":"白鹿书院的魔翼龙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"901220655170247","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7339051860776455193","book_info":{"abstract":"混沌鸿蒙玄荒圣体，八荒六合宇内无敌；九大分身未了情缘，万种风情群芳旖旎。笔者视角独特想象力丰富，却又脱俗清新。天魔乱舞龙凤合吟，最是那风景。来吧，请以强烈的代入感，去体验绝色佳人那横生的媚态、绕指的柔情。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o1077c8be58019a766f067562d73f1732~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"雨夜呼吸","author_id":"","book_id":"7339051860776455193","book_name":"仙落玄荒","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#183058","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4933人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1140,\"name\":\"东方仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140\u0026name=东方仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026ge
